title: Gum Tree Caravan Park
description: Modern lodging offering kitchens, dining tables and living areas, plus BBQs and a kids' play area.
address: 8 Amble Lane (off, Toolong Rd, Port Fairy VIC 3284, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set in a caravan park 400 m off Highway A1, these relaxed holiday cabins are 4.8 km from Griffiths Island and 14 km from the Tower Hill Reserve.
 Straightforward modern cabins offer air conditioning, Wi-Fi, and flat-screen TVs with DVD players, as well as kitchens, sofas and dining areas. All also include shared or en suite bathrooms, and some add bunk beds and/or patios with seating. Minimum-stay rules may apply.
 Amenities include a guest kitchen and BBQ facilities, along with a kids' play area and a shaded patio. Laundry facilities are available, and pets are welcome by prior arrangement.
